Red Team Cybersecurity Services | Digital Forensics .company <

Test Your Defenses Against Real Adversaries

Unlike penetration testing, red team operations simulate a persistent, motivated adversary with specific objectives. We operate covertly, chain multiple attack vectors, and test your detection and response capabilities under realistic conditions.

Red Team Capabilities

  • Multi-vector adversary simulation (physical + digital + social)
  • Custom malware development and C2 infrastructure
  • Social engineering and pretexting campaigns
  • Physical security assessment and bypass
  • Assumed breach scenarios
  • Purple team collaboration with your SOC

Engagement Outcomes

Every red team engagement delivers a comprehensive debrief with attack narratives, detection gap analysis, and prioritized improvements. We work with your blue team to strengthen defenses based on real-world findings.

>

HEROFull-scope red team operations including physical, social engineering, and technical attack chains. Test your defenses against realistic adversary simulation.

Test Your Defenses Against Real Adversaries

Unlike penetration testing, red team operations simulate a persistent, motivated adversary with specific objectives. We operate covertly, chain multiple attack vectors, and test your detection and response capabilities under realistic conditions.

Red Team Capabilities

  • Multi-vector adversary simulation (physical + digital + social)
  • Custom malware development and C2 infrastructure
  • Social engineering and pretexting campaigns
  • Physical security assessment and bypass
  • Assumed breach scenarios
  • Purple team collaboration with your SOC

Engagement Outcomes

Every red team engagement delivers a comprehensive debrief with attack narratives, detection gap analysis, and prioritized improvements. We work with your blue team to strengthen defenses based on real-world findings.

Attack Vectors

  • Technical Exploitation
  • Social Engineering
  • Physical Intrusion
  • Supply Chain
  • Insider Threat

Unlike penetration testing, red team operations simulate a persistent, motivated adversary with specific objectives. We operate covertly, chain multiple attack vectors, and test your detection and response capabilities under realistic conditions.
